details.note: Declarative state machine spec + deterministic reducer. Defines PredicateSpec discriminated union (20 predicate kinds), AgentStateMachineSpec type hierarchy, LANE_STATE_MACHINE (15 states, 16 transitions), CAMPAIGN_STATE_MACHINE (12 states, 22 transitions), and reduceCampaignState pure function.
Added export * from ./state-machine to expose all types and constants
